The question is asking to determine the total number of tracks that feature Ice Cube. Since each row represents a track and the "featured guest(s)" column indicates who is featured on that track, we need to count the number of rows where Ice Cube appears in the "featured guest(s)" column. We can use the f_group_column(featured guest(s)) operation to group the tracks based on their featured guests to analyze this situation.
Ice Cube is featured in the first track (row 1) and also in the second track along with Mack 10 (row 2). Therefore, Ice Cube is featured in 2 tracks in total.
